title: Zoni's Apotheosis Curios Lang
description: A resource pack to fix the naming when using the Zoni's Apothiosis Curios data pack
body:
[![alt text](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/aa8962f9-e6ff-4a83-8eeb-d145d3c55343.webp) ](https://bisecthosting.com/Zoni25)

This is a simple resource pack to fix the naming when using my data pack for [Apothic Curios](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-curios).

 

Requirements
You need both my data pack and the previously mentioned Apothic Curios, otherwise you won't notice any changes.

 

If you want to get updates on the pack development, report bugs or suggest new stuff or just contact me join my discord server:
https://discord.com/invite/KWGakdBVwG
